name: MDM Profile enrollment
description: Ensure the device is enrolled in the central MDM management server.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper mdm profile enrollment settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on MDM Profile enrollment. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `mdm_status=enrolled` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "mdm_status=enrolled", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-DAM-01", "cost": "MEDIUM", "estimated_time_hours": 2}
